raw_title: LifeBench: A Benchmark for Long-Horizon Multi-Source Memory
raw_content: arXiv:2603.03781v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long-term memory is fundamental for personalized agents capable of accumulating knowledge, reasoning over user experiences, and adapting across time. However, existing memory benchmarks primarily target declarative memory, specifically semantic and episodic types, where all information is explicitly presented in dialogues. In contrast, real-world actions are also governed by non-declarative memory, including habitual and procedural types, and need to be inferred from diverse digital traces. To bridge this gap, we introduce Lifebench, which features densely connected, long-horizon event simulation. It pushes AI agents beyond simple recall, requiring the integration of declarative and non-declarative memory reasoning across diverse and temporally extended contexts. Building such a benchmark presents two key challenges: ensuring data quality and scalability. We maintain data quality by employing real-world priors, including anonymized social surveys, map APIs, and holiday-integrated calendars, thus enforcing fidelity, diversity and behavioral rationality within the dataset. Towards scalability, we draw inspiration from cognitive science and structure events according to their partonomic hierarchy; enabling efficient parallel generation while maintaining global coherence. Performance results show that top-tier, state-of-the-art memory systems reach just 55.2\% accuracy, highlighting the inherent difficulty of long-horizon retrieval and multi-source integration within our proposed benchmark. The dataset and data synthesis code are available at https://github.com/1754955896/LifeBench.
generated_title: LifeBench：长期多源记忆基准测试发布
generated_summary: 提出LifeBench基准测试，整合声明性与非声明性记忆，推动AI agents跨长期上下文推理，当前最先进系统准确率仅55.2%。
generated_analysis:
LifeBench的发布标志着AI agent记忆能力评估进入新阶段。当前基准测试主要聚焦声明性记忆（语义、情景），而现实人类行为同时依赖非声明性记忆（习惯、程序），这一差异导致现有AI系统难以真正模拟用户的长期行为模式。LifeBench通过整合两类记忆并构建长周期事件链，填补了行业评估体系的空白。

55.2%的准确率数据揭示了关键痛点：即便最先进系统也难以高效整合多源信息进行跨时域推理。这对企业决策者意味着两点：一是现有AI agent的个性化服务能力存在明显天花板，用户体验升级空间巨大；二是记忆系统的核心竞争力将成为差异化关键，谁能率先突破多源记忆融合技术，谁就可能在智能助手、自动化工作流等场景建立优势。

从趋势看，认知科学启发的层级事件架构为数据合成提供了可行路径，预计将加速高质量训练数据的规模化产出。未来1-2年内，记忆推理精度每提升10个百分点，都将打开新的商业化场景。建议关注具备跨模态记忆研发能力的标的，同时在产品设计中降低对AI长期记忆准确性的依赖预期。
